  title: MemoSprout Generated Files Demo API
  version: 1.0.0
paths:
  /users/{id}:
    get:
      operationId: getUser
      responses:
        "200":
          description: User response
components:
  schemas:
    User:
      type: object
      required:
        - id
        - name
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
        name:
          type: string
// Generated by scripts/generate-client.ts from api/openapi.yaml.

export interface User {
  id: string;
  name: string;
}

export function buildUserUrl(baseUrl: string, userId: string): string {
  const normalizedBaseUrl = baseUrl.endsWith("/") ? baseUrl.slice(0, -1) : baseUrl;
  return `${normalizedBaseUrl}/users/${encodeURIComponent(userId)}`;
}
